category_sources: source_facts.description says libtrace is a library for trace processing supporting multiple inputs.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives libtrace; source_facts.repo is the official LibtraceTeam/libtrace repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage/source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository, used as the README documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes trace processing; source_facts.executables lists traceconvert, tracefilter, tracereplay, and other CLI tools.
